History.Title: History

Safety.AssistantFiltered: A potentially unsafe assistant reply was replaced.
Safety.AssistantReplacement: I need to respond carefully here. If this is about real self-harm risk or immediate danger, contact local emergency services or a crisis line in your area right now. If you want, tell me what is happening and I will keep responding carefully.
Safety.GetHelp: If this reflects a real risk, contact local emergency services or a crisis line in your area now.
Safety.LockoutMessage: This conversation has been locked due to a safety concern. Clear the chat to start a new conversation.
Safety.ScreeningQuotaExceeded: This message could not be screened for safety due to insufficient quota. It has been withheld as a precaution. You can manage your screening quota in Settings → AI Safety.
Safety.UserConcernResponse: I need to respond carefully to that. If this reflects a real self-harm risk, contact local emergency services or a crisis line in your area now. If you want, tell me what is happening and I will keep responding carefully.
Safety.UserUrgentResponse: I am taking this seriously. If this is about immediate danger or self-harm risk, contact local emergency services or a crisis line in your area right now. If you want, tell me whether you are in immediate danger, and I will respond carefully.

AgeVerification.Title: AI Conversation Agent — EULA
AgeVerification.AIWarning: AI-generated responses may be inaccurate or inappropriate. This agent is not a human and cannot provide professional advice.
AgeVerification.SafetyNotice: Safety screening is ON (uses extra quota per message). If harmful content is detected, the chat will be terminated immediately. Settings → AI Safety to disable.
AgeVerification.AgeVerificationText: You have enabled a cloud LLM provider. Cloud AI services route your conversations through remote servers, which means your messages are not processed entirely on your own machine. Due to data-protection and liability frameworks for hosted cloud AI services, you must be 18 or older to use the hosted Cloud AI tutor.
AgeVerification.Certification: By continuing, you certify you are 18 or older and accept the EULA.

Banner.AIWarning: ⚠️ AI-generated responses may be inaccurate or inappropriate. This agent is not a human and cannot provide professional advice.
Banner.TerminationNotice: If harmful content is detected, the chat will be terminated.

Commands.NewTopicDesc: Switch to a new conversation topic
Commands.CompactDesc: Summarize older context for faster replies
Commands.CompactSkipped: There is not enough conversation to compact yet.
Commands.CompactBusy: Wait for the current reply to finish before compacting.

ExplainAi.Description: Installs a local LLM Neural Network. Skips ~3 GB of dependencies if left unchecked.

Reader.Description: Installs OCR capabilities for reading manga/images. Skips ~2 GB of dependencies if left unchecked.

Voice.Description: Installs speech recognition, text-to-speech, and voice cloning. Skips ~4 GB of dependencies if left unchecked.
Voice.Title: Install Voice & TTS Module

Instructions.ChooseComponents: Choose what you want to learn and how mLearn should speak to you.
Instructions.DownloadNote: All downloads are handled automatically. A stable connection is recommended.

AutoSuggestFlashcards.Label: Auto-suggest Flashcards
AutoSuggestFlashcards.Description: Automatically capture new words seen during video or reading as suggested flashcards.

AutoSuggestUnknownWords.Label: Suggest Non-Dictionary Words
AutoSuggestUnknownWords.Description: Also capture words that are not in the dictionary as suggested flashcards.

DevMode.Description: Enable developer tools and debugging features

HoverKnownGetFromDictionary.Description: Fetch dictionary data even for known words

Plugins.Title: Plugins
Plugins.Description: Manage installed plugins and their permissions.

Empty.Title: No plugins installed
Empty.Description: Install a plugin package to extend mLearn.

Shiritori.Title: Shiritori
Shiritori.Description: Chain Japanese nouns. The next word must start with the last kana. Words ending in ん make you lose. No duplicates allowed.

Turn.User: Your turn — say a word starting with "{kana}"
Turn.UserFirst: Your turn — say any Japanese noun

Error.Duplicate: You cannot use a word twice.
Error.NotFound: That word was not found in the dictionary.
Error.EndsWithN: Word ends in ん — you lose!
Error.NoReading: Could not determine the reading of that word.

Shiritori.LanguageWarning: This plugin is only available when Japanese is the active language. Please switch to Japanese in the settings to play.

KnowledgePriority.Description: Configure how word knowledge is determined from multiple sources

ResolutionMode.Label: Resolution Mode
ResolutionMode.Description: How to determine word status when multiple sources have data

SourceOrder.Label: Source Priority
SourceOrder.Description: Reorder the sources. In order-based mode, the first source with data determines the word status

Reader.Description: Configure OCR and manga reader settings

Hide.Label: Hide reading annotations
Hide.Description: Cover detected reading annotations with white boxes that reveal on hover (for reading practice)

Enable.Description: Use AI to explain words and grammar
Enable.Label: Enable LLM Explanations

PassiveWordTracking.Description: Automatically track word familiarity from reading and hovering. A hover counts after {delay} ms. After {count} counted hovers, the word is marked as failed and shows up in struggled-word lists and AI tutor review.

Action.Description: What to do on each counted hover once the word is in the failed state
Action.Label: Failed Word Action

EaseDecrease.Description: How much ease to subtract when the failed-word action is set to decrease ease
EaseDecrease.Label: Ease Decrease Amount

FailCount.Description: How many counted hovers it takes before a word is marked as failed for this media
FailCount.Label: Hovers to Mark Failed

HoverDelay.Description: How long a hover must last before it counts as one failed-word attempt
HoverDelay.Label: Counted Hover Delay

PassiveWordTracking.Label: Passive Word Tracking

Hotkey.Description: Key to hold to activate the magnifying glass for zooming images
Hotkey.Label: Magnifier Hotkey

Size.Description: Size of the magnifying glass lens in pixels
Size.Label: Lens Size

Zoom.Description: Magnification factor for the magnifying glass
Zoom.Label: Zoom Level

CropPadding.Description: Extra pixels around text when cropping for flashcards
CropPadding.Label: OCR Crop Padding

CropMode.Description: Only recognize text from manually selected crop regions to reduce memory use on budget computers
CropMode.Label: Crop Mode

Enable.Description: Enable optical character recognition for images
Enable.Label: Enable OCR

ReadingAnnotationDetection.Label: Reading annotation detection
ReadingAnnotationDetection.Description: Detect and filter reading annotations from OCR results. When disabled, all detected text boxes are shown as-is without reading annotation filtering.

Reader.Title: Reader

HoverKey.Description: Key to hold while hovering to show word popup
HoverKey.Label: Hover Key

TriggerMode.Description: How word translation popup is triggered in the reader
TriggerMode.Label: Hover Trigger Mode

AddScreenshots.Description: Include screenshots from video and reader in flashcards
AddScreenshots.Label: Add Screenshots

Enable.Description: Source flashcard data from Anki via AnkiConnect. Anki cards take priority over mLearn's built-in cards

Meaning.Description: The field containing the definition or meaning
Meaning.Label: Meaning Field

Reading.Description: The field containing the reading or pronunciation
Reading.Label: Reading Field

ModelName.Description: Anki note type to use for new cards
ModelName.Label: Note Type

Preview.NoCard: No cards found for this note type
Preview.Title: Card Preview

Templates.Description: Define the content for each Anki field. Placeholders: {word}, {reading}, {meaning}, {example}, {exampleMeaning}

Preview.Label: Template Preview
Preview.Description: Preview of how fields will look with sample data

LearningEase.Label: Anki: Learning Ease
LearningEase.Description: Anki ease factor assigned when a word is marked as Learning (integer, 1000–3000)

KnownEase.Label: Anki: Known Ease
KnownEase.Description: Anki ease factor assigned when a word is marked as Known (integer, 1000–3000)

AutomaticCreation.Description: Automatically create flashcards from words you encounter while studying
AutomaticCreation.Label: Automatic Flashcard Creation

CreateUnseenCards.Description: Auto-create cards for new words at your target level
CreateUnseenCards.Label: Create Unseen Cards

Enable.Description: Use mLearn's built-in spaced repetition system instead of Anki
Enable.Label: Use mLearn SRS

LevelCardProportion.Description: Percentage of auto-created cards from language levels (0-1)
LevelCardProportion.Label: Level Card Proportion

FlipAnimation.Description: Show a 3D flip animation when revealing flashcard answers
FlipAnimation.Label: Card Flip Animation

ForceRecreate.BackendUnavailable: Cannot reach the backend. Make sure the Python server is running.

LLMExamples.Description: Use an LLM to generate example sentences when auto-creating flashcards (requires backend connection)
LLMExamples.Label: Generate Example Sentences

LeechThreshold.Description: Number of lapses before a card is flagged as a leech (0 = disabled)
LeechThreshold.Label: Leech Threshold

StaleLearningDays.Label: Stale Learning Threshold (days)
StaleLearningDays.Description: Re-show words marked as "Learning" in Word Sync after this many days without a status change

LearningEase.Label: Built-in SRS: Learning Ease
LearningEase.Description: Initial ease factor assigned when a word is marked as Learning (e.g. 1.55)

KnownEase.Label: Built-in SRS: Known Ease
KnownEase.Description: Initial ease factor assigned when a word is marked as Known (e.g. 1.8)

NukeFlashcards.Description: Permanently delete all flashcards and reset everything (cannot be undone!)
NukeFlashcards.Label: Delete All Flashcards
NukeFlashcards.ModalWarning: This will permanently delete all your flashcards, word tracking data, grammar knowledge, daily statistics, and all learning progress. This is irreversible and will restore the flashcard system to its initial empty state, as if the app was freshly installed.

ResetSRS.Description: Clear all flashcard progress (cannot be undone!)
ResetSRS.Label: Reset SRS Data
ResetSRS.ModalWarning: This will reset all flashcard scheduling data including intervals, ease factors, review counts, and learning progress. Your flashcard content will be preserved, but all cards will return to the 'new' state.
ResetSRS.Success: All SRS data has been reset.

MaxNewCardsLearning.Description: Maximum new cards to study per day (-1 = unlimited)
MaxNewCardsLearning.Label: Max New Cards to Learn

MaxReviews.Description: Maximum review cards to study per day (-1 = unlimited)
MaxReviews.Label: Max Reviews Per Day

NewDayHour.Description: Hour at which the SRS day resets (0-23). Cards reviewed before this hour count as the previous day. Default: 4 (4:00 AM)
NewDayHour.Label: New Day Start Hour

UI.ResetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to defaults? This cannot be undone.
UI.Title: Settings

ColourCodes.Description: Colour code words based on their grammatical role
ColourCodes.Label: Part of Speech Colours

ColourKnown.Description: Highlight words you've learned with a distinct colour
ColourKnown.Label: Colour Known Words

KnownColour.Description: Colour used to highlight known words
KnownColour.Label: Known Word Colour

KnownThreshold.Description: Ease above which a word is considered known (0–5000 = 0.0–5.0 scale)
KnownThreshold.Label: Built-in SRS: Known Threshold

PosColors.Description: Customize the color for each part of speech tag. These colors are used to highlight words in subtitles, the reader, and the conversation agent.

AnkiLearningThreshold.Label: Anki: Learning Threshold
AnkiLearningThreshold.Description: Anki card factor above which a word is considered learning

SrsLearningThreshold.Label: Built-in SRS: Learning Threshold
SrsLearningThreshold.Description: Ease above which a word is considered learning (0–5000 = 0.0–5.0 scale)

AnkiKnownThreshold.Label: Anki: Known Threshold
AnkiKnownThreshold.Description: Anki card factor above which a word is considered known

EaseUnknownThreshold.Label: Unknown Threshold
EaseUnknownThreshold.Description: Minimum ease for a word to be considered unknown (starting point)

EaseLearningThreshold.Label: Learning Threshold
EaseLearningThreshold.Description: Ease at which a word is considered being learned

EaseKnownThreshold.Label: Known Threshold
EaseKnownThreshold.Description: Ease at which a word is considered known

EaseMasteredThreshold.Label: Mastered Threshold
EaseMasteredThreshold.Description: Ease at which a word is considered mastered

ManualStatusEaseBuffer.Label: Manual Status Ease Buffer
ManualStatusEaseBuffer.Description: Extra ease added when manually setting a word's status. Provides a grace period before passive hover tracking can downgrade it.

VideoPlayer.Title: Video Player
VideoPlayer.Description: Configure video player and subtitle behaviour

Show.Label: Show Live Translator
Show.Description: Display the live word translator panel alongside the video

IncludeKnown.Label: Include Known Words
IncludeKnown.Description: Also add words you already know to the live translator

BlurKnown.Label: Blur Known Words
BlurKnown.Description: Apply a blur effect to words you already know in subtitles

VideoFit.Label: Video Fit
VideoFit.Description: How the video scales within the player area

ShowSubtitles.Label: Show Subtitles
ShowSubtitles.Description: Toggle subtitle visibility in the video player

ShowTranslation.Label: Show Translation
ShowTranslation.Description: Show the translation line below subtitles

SubtitlePosition.Label: Subtitle Position
SubtitlePosition.Description: Position of the subtitles on screen

RemoveParentheses.Label: Remove Parentheses Content
RemoveParentheses.Description: Strip text enclosed in parentheses from subtitles

RemoveSpeakerNames.Label: Remove Speaker Names
RemoveSpeakerNames.Description: Strip speaker name prefixes from subtitle lines

MediaType.Label: Media Type
MediaType.Description: Attach a screenshot or a video clip from the subtitle segment to new flashcards

VideoMargin.Label: Video Clip Margin
VideoMargin.Description: Extra time before and after the subtitle to include in the video clip

BrowserExtension.Title: Browser Extension
BrowserExtension.Description: Install the mLearn browser extension to sync video playback with the app.
BrowserExtension.DetectError: Failed to detect browsers. Please try again.
BrowserExtension.NoBrowsersHint: Add a custom browser path below if your browser is not detected automatically.
BrowserExtension.ManualChrome: Open Chrome Extensions (chrome://extensions/), enable Developer mode, click Load unpacked, and select the extension/dist/ folder.
BrowserExtension.ManualFirefox: Open about:debugging, click This Firefox, then click Load Temporary Add-on and select the extension/dist/manifest.json file.
BrowserExtension.ManualUnknown: Please refer to your browser's documentation for loading unpacked extensions.
BrowserExtension.CustomPathHint: Select the browser's main executable or app bundle (e.g., Chrome.app, chrome.exe, firefox.exe). Do not select the Extensions folder.
BrowserExtension.ManualInstallHint: Automatic installation failed. You can install the extension manually:
BrowserExtension.Step1: Open your browser's extensions page (chrome://extensions/ or about:addons)
BrowserExtension.Step2: Enable Developer mode (Chrome) or open the gear icon (Firefox)
BrowserExtension.Step4: Select the extension folder that was opened

Statistics.Description: Track your progress and learning journey
Statistics.Title: Learning Statistics

Sidebar.UnknownWordsEmpty: No unknown words found yet. Play the video with subtitles loaded.

Video.VideoClipFailed: Video clip failed, using screenshot instead
Video.SubtitleExtractionFailed: Could not extract subtitles from this video. Try loading an external subtitle file instead.
Video.SubtitleTracksDetected: Subtitle tracks detected. Auto-extraction not available for large files. Load an external subtitle file or extract them with ffmpeg.

Overlay.DropSubtitle: Drag and drop a subtitle file here

Mode.Title: Watch Together
Mode.Subtitle: Choose how you want to connect

Local.Title: Local Network
Local.Description: Share playback with tethered browsers on the same network.

Code.Title: Room Code
Code.Description: Create or join a room using a shareable code. Requires sign-in.

Code.Title: Watch Together Room
Code.Subtitle: Host or join a watch-together session
Code.HostDescription: Create a new room and share the code with others.
Code.JoinDescription: Enter the room code shared by the host.
Code.ActiveOwnerDescription: Share the room code below with others to let them join.
Code.ActiveViewerDescription: You are synced with the room host.
Code.UnshareableVideo: This video source cannot be shared remotely.
Code.RoomClosed: The room has been closed by the host.
Code.SignInRequiredMessage: Sign in with your mLearn Cloud account to use room codes.
Code.SignInCodeHint: If you received a device code, enter it below

Extension.SignInRequired: Sign in to use Watch Together

Media.DistributeSubtitle: Send the media file to connected participants via cloud sync
Media.SelectFile: Select a media file to distribute
Media.DistributionComplete: Distribution complete. All participants have received the media.
Media.ReceivePrompt: A participant wants to send you a media file. Do you want to receive it?

Anki.NoCardFound: No Anki card found for this word

EditTranslation.PitchError: Failed to fetch pitch accent data
EditTranslation.Title: Edit translation – {word}

WordDbEditor.EmptyIgnoredState: No ignored words found for this language.
WordDbEditor.EmptyState: No words found. Click 'Load All' to load your word database.
WordDbEditor.SearchHintDetailed: Enter to search; exact matches prioritized. Press Load All first.
WordDbEditor.Title: Word Database

WordHover.AddToBuiltInSrs: Click to add to built-in SRS

Alerts.ExplainRequiresLlm: The explain feature requires the local AI language model. Please enable LLM in settings and restart the app.

AnkiDuplicateWarning.Message: This word already exists in Anki. Adding it to the built-in SRS will create a duplicate flashcard.
AnkiDuplicateWarning.Title: Duplicate Flashcard

StatusSourceWarning.Message: This word's status is determined by its highest knowledge source. Manually changing it may have no effect if Anki or Flashcards already track this word at a higher level.
StatusSourceWarning.Title: Status Override

AnkiModifyWarning.Title: Modify Anki Cards
AnkiModifyWarning.Message: This will modify the ease and position of your Anki cards for this word. New cards will be moved to the front of your review queue.

AnkiAddAllWarning.Title: Modify Anki Cards
AnkiAddAllWarning.Message: This will reposition Anki cards for known words to the front of the review queue and update their ease. For words not in Anki, you will be asked where to save them.

WordSync.FinishedDescription: You checked {count} words. Your word knowledge has been updated.

Menu.ForceRecreateFlashcards: Force recreate new flashcards for today

RecreateFlashcards.Title: Recreate Flashcards
RecreateFlashcards.Message: This will create new flashcards from your tracked word candidates. Continue?

ComponentsTab.Description: Review installed components individually. Keep a group enabled to include it during reinstall.
ComponentsTab.RestartNote: The app will restart after installation completes.

AI.Title: AI components
AI.Description: Local model runtime and Python model tooling.

Reader.Title: Reader and OCR components
Reader.Description: Image text recognition models used by reader OCR.

Voice.Title: Voice components
Voice.Description: Speech recognition (STT), synthesis (TTS), and voice activity detection (VAD). Models are auto-selected based on your hardware.

Dictionaries.Title: Installed dictionaries
Dictionaries.Description: Downloaded dictionary packs available on this computer.

BuiltinChatRuntime.Title: Built-in chat model runtime
BuiltinChatRuntime.Description: Runs downloaded GGUF chat models locally.

TransformersSupport.Title: Transformers and PyTorch support
TransformersSupport.Description: Python model dependencies used by legacy local LLM tooling.

RapidOCR.Title: RapidOCR models
RapidOCR.Description: Fast OCR recognition for reader screenshots.

PaddleOCR.Title: PaddleOCR models
PaddleOCR.Description: Accurate OCR recognition and detection models.

GenericOCR.Title: {engine} OCR runtime
GenericOCR.Description: OCR runtime declared by installed language data.

WhisperSmall.Title: Whisper STT engine
WhisperSmall.Description: Local speech recognition for voice conversations. Uses MLX acceleration on Apple Silicon, faster-whisper on other platforms.

KokoroTts.Title: Kokoro TTS model
KokoroTts.Description: Fast lightweight text-to-speech (82M) for everyday narration.

SileroVad.Title: Silero VAD model
SileroVad.Description: Voice activity detection for hands-free calls. Runs via ONNX runtime for low latency.

QwenTts.Title: Qwen3 TTS model
QwenTts.Description: Voice cloning and expressive text-to-speech (0.6B). Higher quality, slower than Kokoro.

GenericTTS.Title: {engine} TTS runtime
GenericTTS.Description: Speech synthesis runtime declared by installed language data.

Diagnostics.Title: mLearn Diagnostics
Diagnostics.EmptyTitle: Click "Run All Tests" to validate every feature in mLearn.
Diagnostics.EmptyDescription: This will test the Python backend, LLM providers, cloud connectivity, dictionaries, OCR, voice, storage, media protocols, and more — all using real services.

Eula.Title: End User License Agreement
Eula.AgreeLabel: I have read and agree to the End User License Agreement

FilterBuilder.FilterBoxEmpty: Drag filters here to build your expression

Error.EmptySubexpression: Empty group — add a filter inside the parentheses
Error.TrailingOperator: Expression ends with an operator — add a filter value

Disclaimer.Title: Character levels are estimated
Disclaimer.Description: Characters here are inferred from the words assigned to each level, then extracted from those words. That makes this grid approximate: some levels include words whose characters are not themselves required.

CharacterGrid.Description: Colors: learning (orange→yellow), known (green→light-green); unknown (gray). Hover for details.

EmptyState.Description: Characters will appear here as you encounter them in videos and texts.
EmptyState.Hint: Start watching or reading content to begin tracking!
EmptyState.Title: No tracked characters yet

Unsupported.Description: This language package does not define character-study scripts.
Unsupported.Title: Character study is not available for this language

CharacterGrid.Title: Character Knowledge Overview
